content: Phase 5 build prompt analysis. Delegated to all 3 teams: Planning (analyze + plan + spec), Engineering (build), Validation (review).
Produced plan.md (268 lines) and spec.md (292 lines). Identified 7 deviations, 3 blocking. 26 acceptance criteria defined. Architect verified all API contracts. Spec Writer produced full AC table.
Backend Dev implemented all 3 sub-prompts (5-A paper connector, 5-B TUI, 5-C startup wiring). Code Reviewer approved with 5 minor findings. 154 tests pass, zero clippy warnings. 8 files changed.

QA: 26/26 ACs pass, 154 tests, zero clippy. Security: zero CRITICAL/HIGH, 4 LOW findings (Display location, async mutex, daily_pnl stale, SIGKILL terminal). Paper trading safety boundary verified. Overall: PASS.
Phase 5 build complete. All teams approved. Gate: PASS.
